content.text: I'll start by reading the file to understand the theorem I need to prove.
Let me explore the environment and understand the baseline before writing the proof.

input.command: ls -la && file check_proof_bin && cat check_proof_bin 2>/dev/null | head -c 500

content.content:
usage: check_proof_bin [-h] [--level {1,2}] [--tlapm TLAPM]
                       [--tlapm-lib TLAPM_LIB] [--timeout TIMEOUT]
                       [--output OUTPUT]
                       file

Check a single TLAPS benchmark proof

positional arguments:
  file                  Path to the benchmark .tla file

options:
  -h, --help            show this help message and exit
  --level {1,2}         Benchmark level — controls cheating rules (default: 1)
  --tlapm TLAPM         Path to tlapm binary
  --tlapm-lib TLAPM_LIB
                        Path to tlapm lib directory
  --timeout TIMEOUT     Timeout in seconds
  --output OUTPUT, -o OUTPUT
                        Write results to this file (default: <input>.result)

                       [--tlapm-lib TLAPM_LIB] [--timeout TIMEOUT]
                       [--output OUTPUT]
                       file

Check a single TLAPS benchmark proof

positional arguments:
  file                  Path to the benchmark .tla file

options:
  -h, --help            show this help message and exit
  --level {1,2}         Benchmark level — controls cheating rules (default: 1)

                        Write results to this file (default: <input>.result)

content.content:
1	----------------------------- MODULE VoteProof ------------------------------ 
2	
3	EXTENDS Integers , FiniteSets, TLC, TLAPS
4	
5	-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
6	CONSTANT Value,     
7	         Acceptor,  
8	         Quorum     
9	
10	ASSUME QA == /\ \A Q \in Quorum : Q \subseteq Acceptor
11	             /\ \A Q1, Q2 \in Quorum : Q1 \cap Q2 # {}  
12	 
13	THEOREM QuorumNonEmpty == \A Q \in Quorum : Q # {}
14	  PROOF OMITTED
15	
16	-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
17	
18	Ballot == Nat
19	-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
20	
21	VARIABLES votes, maxBal
22	
23	VotedFor(a, b, v) == <<b, v>> \in votes[a]
24	
25	DidNotVoteIn(a, b) == \A v \in Value : ~ VotedFor(a, b, v)
26	
27	SafeAt(b, v) ==
28	  LET SA[bb \in Ballot] ==
29	        \/ bb = 0
30	        \/ \E Q \in Quorum :
31	             /\ \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \geq bb
32	             /\ \E c \in -1..(bb-1) :
33	                  /\ (c # -1) => /\ SA[c]
34	                                 /\ \A a \in Q :
35	                                      \A w \in Value :
36	                                         VotedFor(a, c, w) => (w = v)
37	                  /\ \A d \in (c+1)..(bb-1), a \in Q : DidNotVoteIn(a, d)
38	  IN  SA[b]
39	
40	vars == << votes, maxBal >>
41	
42	ProcSet == (Acceptor)
43	
44	Init == 
45	        /\ votes = [a \in Acceptor |-> {}]
46	        /\ maxBal = [a \in Acceptor |-> -1]
47	
48	acceptor(self) == \E b \in Ballot:
49	                    \/ /\ b > maxBal[self]
50	                       /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
51	                       /\ UNCHANGED votes
52	                    \/ /\ \E v \in Value:
53	                            /\ /\ maxBal[self] \leq b
54	                               /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
55	                               /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
56	                                     \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
57	                               /\ SafeAt(b, v)
58	                            /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
59	                            /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
60	
61	Next == (\E self \in Acceptor: acceptor(self))
62	
63	Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars
64	
65	-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
66	
67	THEOREM RecursiveFcnOfNat ==
68	          ASSUME NEW Def(_,_), 
69	                 \A n \in Nat : 
70	                    \A g, h : (\A i \in 0..(n-1) : g[i] = h[i]) => (Def(g, n) = Def(h, n))
71	          PROVE  LET f[n \in Nat] == Def(f, n)
72	                 IN  f = [n \in Nat |-> Def(f, n)]
73	PROOF OMITTED
74	
75	THEOREM SafeAtProp ==
76	  \A b \in Ballot, v \in Value :
77	    SafeAt(b, v) =
78	      \/ b = 0
79	      \/ \E Q \in Quorum :
80	           /\ \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \geq b
81	           /\ \E c \in -1..(b-1) :
82	                /\ (c # -1) => /\ SafeAt(c, v)
83	                               /\ \A a \in Q :
84	                                    \A w \in Value :
85	                                        VotedFor(a, c, w) => (w = v)
86	                /\ \A d \in (c+1)..(b-1), a \in Q : DidNotVoteIn(a, d)
87	  PROOF OMITTED
88	
89	-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
90	
91	TypeOK == /\ votes \in [Acceptor -> SUBSET (Ballot \X Value)]
92	          /\ maxBal \in [Acceptor -> Ballot \cup {-1}]
93	
94	ChosenIn(b, v) == \E Q \in Quorum : \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, b, v)
95	
96	chosen == {v \in Value : \E b \in Ballot : ChosenIn(b, v)}
97	-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
98	
99	AXIOM SimpleNatInduction == \A f : /\ f[0]
100	                                   /\ \A n \in Nat : f[n] => f[n+1]
101	                                   => \A n \in Nat : f[n]
102	
103	THEOREM GeneralNatInduction == 
104	         \A f : /\ f[0]
105	                /\ \A n \in Nat : (\A j \in 0..n : f[j]) => f[n+1]
106	                => \A n \in Nat : f[n]
107	  PROOF OMITTED
108	
109	-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
110	
111	LEMMA SafeLemma == 
112	       TypeOK => 
113	         \A b \in Ballot :
114	           \A v \in Value :
115	              SafeAt(b, v) => 
116	                \A c \in 0..(b-1) :
117	                  \E Q \in Quorum :
118	                    \A a \in Q : /\ maxBal[a] >= c
119	                                 /\ \/ DidNotVoteIn(a, c)
120	                                    \/ VotedFor(a, c, v)
121	  PROOF OMITTED
122	
123	-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
124	
125	VInv1 == \A a \in Acceptor, b \in Ballot, v, w \in Value : 
126	           VotedFor(a, b, v) /\ VotedFor(a, b, w) => (v = w)
127	
128	VInv2 == \A a \in Acceptor, b \in Ballot, v \in Value :
129	                  VotedFor(a, b, v) => SafeAt(b, v)
130	
131	VInv3 ==  \A a1, a2 \in Acceptor, b \in Ballot, v1, v2 \in Value : 
132	                VotedFor(a1, b, v1) /\ VotedFor(a2, b, v2) => (v1 = v2)
133	
134	THEOREM VInv3 => VInv1
135	  PROOF OMITTED
136	
137	-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
138	
139	LEMMA VT0 == /\ TypeOK
140	             /\ VInv1
141	             /\ VInv2
142	             => \A v, w \in Value, b, c \in Ballot : 
143	                   (b > c) /\ SafeAt(b, v) /\ ChosenIn(c, w) => (v = w)
144	  PROOF OMITTED
145	
146	THEOREM VT1 == /\ TypeOK 
147	               /\ VInv1
148	               /\ VInv2
149	               => \A v, w : 
150	                    (v \in chosen) /\ (w \in chosen) => (v = w)
151	  PROOF OMITTED
152	
153	THEOREM SafeAtPropPrime ==
154	  \A b \in Ballot, v \in Value :
155	    SafeAt(b, v)' =
156	      \/ b = 0
157	      \/ \E Q \in Quorum :
158	           /\ \A a \in Q : maxBal'[a] \geq b
159	           /\ \E c \in -1..(b-1) :
160	                /\ (c # -1) => /\ SafeAt(c, v)'
161	                               /\ \A a \in Q :
162	                                    \A w \in Value :
163	                                        VotedFor(a, c, w)' => (w = v)
164	                /\ \A d \in (c+1)..(b-1), a \in Q : DidNotVoteIn(a, d)'
165	PROOF OMITTED
166	
167	LEMMA VT0Prime ==
168	             /\ TypeOK'
169	             /\ VInv1'
170	             /\ VInv2'
171	             => \A v, w \in Value, b, c \in Ballot : 
172	                   (b > c) /\ SafeAt(b, v)' /\ ChosenIn(c, w)' => (v = w)
173	  PROOF OMITTED
174	
175	THEOREM VT1Prime == 
176	               /\ TypeOK' 
177	               /\ VInv1'
178	               /\ VInv2'
179	               => \A v, w : 
180	                    (v \in chosen') /\ (w \in chosen') => (v = w)
181	  PROOF OMITTED
182	
183	-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
184	
185	VInv4 == \A a \in Acceptor, b \in Ballot : 
186	            maxBal[a] < b => DidNotVoteIn(a, b)
187	
188	VInv == TypeOK /\ VInv2 /\ VInv3 /\ VInv4
189	-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
190	
191	IncreaseMaxBal(self, b) ==  
192	  /\ b > maxBal[self]
193	  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
194	  /\ UNCHANGED votes
195	
196	VoteFor(self, b, v) == 
197	  /\ maxBal[self] \leq b
198	  /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
199	  /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
200	        \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
201	  /\ SafeAt(b, v)
202	  /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
203	  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
204	
205	BallotAction(self, b) ==
206	  \/ IncreaseMaxBal(self, b)
207	  \/ \E v \in Value : VoteFor(self, b, v)
208	
209	ASSUME AcceptorNonempty == Acceptor # {}
210	
211	LEMMA NextDef ==
212	  TypeOK => 
213	   (Next =  \E self \in Acceptor :
214	                 \E b \in Ballot : BallotAction(self, b) )
215	  PROOF OMITTED
216	
217	-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
218	
219	THEOREM InductiveInvariance == VInv /\ [Next]_vars => VInv'
220	  PROOF OMITTED
221	
222	THEOREM InitImpliesInv == Init => VInv
223	  PROOF OMITTED
224	
225	THEOREM VT2 == Spec => []VInv
226	  PROOF OMITTED
227	
228	-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
229	
230	C == INSTANCE Consensus 
231	
232	THEOREM VT3 == Spec => C!Spec 
233	  PROOF OMITTED
234	
235	-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
236	
237	ASSUME AcceptorFinite == IsFiniteSet(Acceptor)
238	
239	ASSUME ValueNonempty == Value # {}
240	-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
241	
242	AXIOM SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite == 
243	        \A S, T : IsFiniteSet(T) /\ (S \subseteq T) => IsFiniteSet(S)
244	
245	AXIOM FiniteSetHasMax == 
246	        \A S \in SUBSET Int :
247	          IsFiniteSet(S) /\ (S # {}) => \E max \in S : \A x \in S : max >= x
248	
249	AXIOM IntervalFinite == \A i, j \in Int : IsFiniteSet(i..j)
250	-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
251	
252	THEOREM VT4 == TypeOK /\ VInv2 /\ VInv3  =>
253	                \A Q \in Quorum, b \in Ballot :
254	                   (\A a \in Q : (maxBal[a] >= b)) => \E v \in Value : SafeAt(b,v)
255	
256	  PROOF OMITTED
257	
258	-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
259	
260	LiveAssumption ==
261	  \E Q \in Quorum, b \in Ballot :
262	     \A self \in Q :
263	       /\ WF_vars(BallotAction(self, b))
264	       /\ [] [\A c \in Ballot : (c > b) => ~ BallotAction(self, c)]_vars
265	     
266	LiveSpec == Spec /\ LiveAssumption  
267	
268	-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
269	
270	WellFounded(S, LT) == ~ \E f \in [Nat -> S] : 
271	                           \A i \in Nat : <<f[i+1], f[i]>> \in LT
272	
273	ProperSubsetRel(S) == 
274	  {r \in (SUBSET S) \X (SUBSET S) : /\ r[1] \subseteq r[2]
275	                                    /\ r[1] # r[2] }     
276	                                                     
277	THEOREM SubsetWellFounded ==
278	           \A S : IsFiniteSet(S) => WellFounded(SUBSET S, ProperSubsetRel(S))
279	PROOF OMITTED
280	
281	THEOREM LatticeRule ==  ASSUME NEW S, NEW LT, WellFounded(S, LT),
282	                               NEW TEMPORAL P(_), NEW TEMPORAL Q
283	                        PROVE  /\ Q \/ (\E i \in S : P(i))
284	                               /\ \A i \in S : 
285	                                     P(i) ~> (Q \/ \E j \in S : (<<j, i>> \in LT) /\ P(j))
286	                               => ((\E i \in S : P(i)) ~> Q)
287	PROOF OMITTED
288	
289	THEOREM AlwaysForall ==
290	           ASSUME NEW CONSTANT S, NEW TEMPORAL P(_)
291	           PROVE  (\A s \in S : []P(s)) <=> [](\A s \in S : P(s))
292	  PROOF OMITTED
293	
294	LEMMA EventuallyAlwaysForall == 
295	        ASSUME NEW CONSTANT S, IsFiniteSet(S),
296	               NEW TEMPORAL P(_)
297	        PROVE  (\A s \in S : <>[]P(s)) => <>[](\A s \in S : P(s))
298	
299	PROOF OMITTED
300	-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
301	
302	THEOREM Liveness == LiveSpec => C!LiveSpec
303	  PROOF OMITTED
304	
305	===============================================================================
306	
307

file.content:
----------------------------- MODULE VoteProof ------------------------------ 

EXTENDS Integers , FiniteSets, TLC, TLAPS

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
CONSTANT Value,     
         Acceptor,  
         Quorum     

ASSUME QA == /\ \A Q \in Quorum : Q \subseteq Acceptor
             /\ \A Q1, Q2 \in Quorum : Q1 \cap Q2 # {}  
 
THEOREM QuorumNonEmpty == \A Q \in Quorum : Q # {}
  PROOF OMITTED

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

Ballot == Nat
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

VARIABLES votes, maxBal

VotedFor(a, b, v) == <<b, v>> \in votes[a]

DidNotVoteIn(a, b) == \A v \in Value : ~ VotedFor(a, b, v)

SafeAt(b, v) ==
  LET SA[bb \in Ballot] ==
        \/ bb = 0
        \/ \E Q \in Quorum :
             /\ \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \geq bb
             /\ \E c \in -1..(bb-1) :
                  /\ (c # -1) => /\ SA[c]
                                 /\ \A a \in Q :
                                      \A w \in Value :
                                         VotedFor(a, c, w) => (w = v)
                  /\ \A d \in (c+1)..(bb-1), a \in Q : DidNotVoteIn(a, d)
  IN  SA[b]

vars == << votes, maxBal >>

ProcSet == (Acceptor)

Init == 
        /\ votes = [a \in Acceptor |-> {}]
        /\ maxBal = [a \in Acceptor |-> -1]

acceptor(self) == \E b \in Ballot:
                    \/ /\ b > maxBal[self]
                       /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
                       /\ UNCHANGED votes
                    \/ /\ \E v \in Value:
                            /\ /\ maxBal[self] \leq b
                               /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
                               /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
                                     \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
                               /\ SafeAt(b, v)
                            /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
                            /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

Next == (\E self \in Acceptor: acceptor(self))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

THEOREM RecursiveFcnOfNat ==
          ASSUME NEW Def(_,_), 
                 \A n \in Nat : 
                    \A g, h : (\A i \in 0..(n-1) : g[i] = h[i]) => (Def(g, n) = Def(h, n))
          PROVE  LET f[n \in Nat] == Def(f, n)
                 IN  f = [n \in Nat |-> Def(f, n)]
PROOF OMITTED

THEOREM SafeAtProp ==
  \A b \in Ballot, v \in Value :
    SafeAt(b, v) =
      \/ b = 0
      \/ \E Q \in Quorum :
           /\ \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \geq b
           /\ \E c \in -1..(b-1) :
                /\ (c # -1) => /\ SafeAt(c, v)
                               /\ \A a \in Q :
                                    \A w \in Value :
                                        VotedFor(a, c, w) => (w = v)
                /\ \A d \in (c+1)..(b-1), a \in Q : DidNotVoteIn(a, d)
  PROOF OMITTED

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

TypeOK == /\ votes \in [Acceptor -> SUBSET (Ballot \X Value)]
          /\ maxBal \in [Acceptor -> Ballot \cup {-1}]

ChosenIn(b, v) == \E Q \in Quorum : \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, b, v)

chosen == {v \in Value : \E b \in Ballot : ChosenIn(b, v)}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM SimpleNatInduction == \A f : /\ f[0]
                                   /\ \A n \in Nat : f[n] => f[n+1]
                                   => \A n \in Nat : f[n]

THEOREM GeneralNatInduction == 
         \A f : /\ f[0]
                /\ \A n \in Nat : (\A j \in 0..n : f[j]) => f[n+1]
                => \A n \in Nat : f[n]
  PROOF OMITTED

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

LEMMA SafeLemma == 
       TypeOK => 
         \A b \in Ballot :
           \A v \in Value :
              SafeAt(b, v) => 
                \A c \in 0..(b-1) :
                  \E Q \in Quorum :
                    \A a \in Q : /\ maxBal[a] >= c
                                 /\ \/ DidNotVoteIn(a, c)
                                    \/ VotedFor(a, c, v)
  PROOF OMITTED

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

VInv1 == \A a \in Acceptor, b \in Ballot, v, w \in Value : 
           VotedFor(a, b, v) /\ VotedFor(a, b, w) => (v = w)

VInv2 == \A a \in Acceptor, b \in Ballot, v \in Value :
                  VotedFor(a, b, v) => SafeAt(b, v)

VInv3 ==  \A a1, a2 \in Acceptor, b \in Ballot, v1, v2 \in Value : 
                VotedFor(a1, b, v1) /\ VotedFor(a2, b, v2) => (v1 = v2)

THEOREM VInv3 => VInv1
  PROOF OMITTED

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

LEMMA VT0 == /\ TypeOK
             /\ VInv1
             /\ VInv2
             => \A v, w \in Value, b, c \in Ballot : 
                   (b > c) /\ SafeAt(b, v) /\ ChosenIn(c, w) => (v = w)
  PROOF OMITTED

THEOREM VT1 == /\ TypeOK 
               /\ VInv1
               /\ VInv2
               => \A v, w : 
                    (v \in chosen) /\ (w \in chosen) => (v = w)
  PROOF OMITTED

THEOREM SafeAtPropPrime ==
  \A b \in Ballot, v \in Value :
    SafeAt(b, v)' =
      \/ b = 0
      \/ \E Q \in Quorum :
           /\ \A a \in Q : maxBal'[a] \geq b
           /\ \E c \in -1..(b-1) :
                /\ (c # -1) => /\ SafeAt(c, v)'
                               /\ \A a \in Q :
                                    \A w \in Value :
                                        VotedFor(a, c, w)' => (w = v)
                /\ \A d \in (c+1)..(b-1), a \in Q : DidNotVoteIn(a, d)'
PROOF OMITTED

LEMMA VT0Prime ==
             /\ TypeOK'
             /\ VInv1'
             /\ VInv2'
             => \A v, w \in Value, b, c \in Ballot : 
                   (b > c) /\ SafeAt(b, v)' /\ ChosenIn(c, w)' => (v = w)
  PROOF OMITTED

THEOREM VT1Prime == 
               /\ TypeOK' 
               /\ VInv1'
               /\ VInv2'
               => \A v, w : 
                    (v \in chosen') /\ (w \in chosen') => (v = w)
  PROOF OMITTED

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

VInv4 == \A a \in Acceptor, b \in Ballot : 
            maxBal[a] < b => DidNotVoteIn(a, b)

VInv == TypeOK /\ VInv2 /\ VInv3 /\ VInv4
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

IncreaseMaxBal(self, b) ==  
  /\ b > maxBal[self]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]
  /\ UNCHANGED votes

VoteFor(self, b, v) == 
  /\ maxBal[self] \leq b
  /\ DidNotVoteIn(self, b)
  /\ \A p \in Acceptor \ {self} :
        \A w \in Value : VotedFor(p, b, w) => (w = v)
  /\ SafeAt(b, v)
  /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![self] = votes[self] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![self] = b]

BallotAction(self, b) ==
  \/ IncreaseMaxBal(self, b)
  \/ \E v \in Value : VoteFor(self, b, v)

ASSUME AcceptorNonempty == Acceptor # {}

LEMMA NextDef ==
  TypeOK => 
   (Next =  \E self \in Acceptor :
                 \E b \in Ballot : BallotAction(self, b) )
  PROOF OMITTED

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

THEOREM InductiveInvariance == VInv /\ [Next]_vars => VInv'
  PROOF OMITTED

THEOREM InitImpliesInv == Init => VInv
  PROOF OMITTED

THEOREM VT2 == Spec => []VInv
  PROOF OMITTED

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

C == INSTANCE Consensus 

THEOREM VT3 == Spec => C!Spec 
  PROOF OMITTED

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

ASSUME AcceptorFinite == IsFiniteSet(Acceptor)

ASSUME ValueNonempty == Value # {}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

AXIOM SubsetOfFiniteSetFinite == 
        \A S, T : IsFiniteSet(T) /\ (S \subseteq T) => IsFiniteSet(S)

AXIOM FiniteSetHasMax == 
        \A S \in SUBSET Int :
          IsFiniteSet(S) /\ (S # {}) => \E max \in S : \A x \in S : max >= x

AXIOM IntervalFinite == \A i, j \in Int : IsFiniteSet(i..j)
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

THEOREM VT4 == TypeOK /\ VInv2 /\ VInv3  =>
                \A Q \in Quorum, b \in Ballot :
                   (\A a \in Q : (maxBal[a] >= b)) => \E v \in Value : SafeAt(b,v)

  PROOF OMITTED

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

LiveAssumption ==
  \E Q \in Quorum, b \in Ballot :
     \A self \in Q :
       /\ WF_vars(BallotAction(self, b))
       /\ [] [\A c \in Ballot : (c > b) => ~ BallotAction(self, c)]_vars
     
LiveSpec == Spec /\ LiveAssumption  

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

WellFounded(S, LT) == ~ \E f \in [Nat -> S] : 
                           \A i \in Nat : <<f[i+1], f[i]>> \in LT

ProperSubsetRel(S) == 
  {r \in (SUBSET S) \X (SUBSET S) : /\ r[1] \subseteq r[2]
                                    /\ r[1] # r[2] }     
                                                     
THEOREM SubsetWellFounded ==
           \A S : IsFiniteSet(S) => WellFounded(SUBSET S, ProperSubsetRel(S))
PROOF OMITTED

THEOREM LatticeRule ==  ASSUME NEW S, NEW LT, WellFounded(S, LT),
                               NEW TEMPORAL P(_), NEW TEMPORAL Q
                        PROVE  /\ Q \/ (\E i \in S : P(i))
                               /\ \A i \in S : 
                                     P(i) ~> (Q \/ \E j \in S : (<<j, i>> \in LT) /\ P(j))
                               => ((\E i \in S : P(i)) ~> Q)
PROOF OMITTED

THEOREM AlwaysForall ==
           ASSUME NEW CONSTANT S, NEW TEMPORAL P(_)
           PROVE  (\A s \in S : []P(s)) <=> [](\A s \in S : P(s))
  PROOF OMITTED

LEMMA EventuallyAlwaysForall == 
        ASSUME NEW CONSTANT S, IsFiniteSet(S),
               NEW TEMPORAL P(_)
        PROVE  (\A s \in S : <>[]P(s)) => <>[](\A s \in S : P(s))

PROOF OMITTED
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

THEOREM Liveness == LiveSpec => C!LiveSpec
  PROOF OMITTED

===============================================================================

content.text:
Baseline fails as expected. Now I understand the model — this is Lamport's Voting/Paxos proof, and `InitImpliesInv` is the easy initialization case. Under `Init`, `votes[a] = {}` for all acceptors, so `VotedFor` is always false, making `VInv2`/`VInv3` vacuously true and `VInv4` trivially true (and `TypeOK` holds since `{}` is a subset of anything and `-1 ∈ Ballot ∪ {-1}`).

Let me write the proof.

input.old_string:
THEOREM InitImpliesInv == Init => VInv
PROOF OBVIOUS
input.new_string:
THEOREM InitImpliesInv == Init => VInv
<1> SUFFICES ASSUME Init
             PROVE  VInv
  OBVIOUS
<1>1. TypeOK
  BY DEF Init, TypeOK, Ballot
<1>2. VInv2
  <2> SUFFICES ASSUME NEW a \in Acceptor, NEW b \in Ballot, NEW v \in Value,
                      VotedFor(a, b, v)
               PROVE  SafeAt(b, v)
    BY DEF VInv2
  <2>1. votes[a] = {}
    BY DEF Init
  <2> QED
    BY <2>1 DEF VotedFor
<1>3. VInv3
  <2> SUFFICES ASSUME NEW a1 \in Acceptor, NEW a2 \in Acceptor, NEW b \in Ballot,
                      NEW v1 \in Value, NEW v2 \in Value,
                      VotedFor(a1, b, v1), VotedFor(a2, b, v2)
               PROVE  v1 = v2
    BY DEF VInv3
  <2>1. votes[a1] = {}
    BY DEF Init
  <2> QED
    BY <2>1 DEF VotedFor
<1>4. VInv4
  <2> SUFFICES ASSUME NEW a \in Acceptor, NEW b \in Ballot,
                      maxBal[a] < b
               PROVE  DidNotVoteIn(a, b)
    BY DEF VInv4
  <2> SUFFICES ASSUME NEW v \in Value
               PROVE  ~ VotedFor(a, b, v)
    BY DEF DidNotVoteIn
  <2>1. votes[a] = {}
    BY DEF Init
  <2> QED
    BY <2>1 DEF VotedFor
<1> QED
  BY <1>1, <1>2, <1>3, <1>4 DEF VInv

content.text:
✅ **PASS** — all 20 obligations proved, no cheating detected at level 2.

## Summary

I replaced the `PROOF OBVIOUS` placeholder for `THEOREM InitImpliesInv == Init => VInv` with a structured TLAPS proof. No helper lemmas were needed — the initial-state case is simple once decomposed.

The key insight is that under `Init`:
- `votes = [a ∈ Acceptor ↦ {}]`, so `VotedFor(a, b, v) ≡ ⟨b,v⟩ ∈ {}` is **always false**.

The proof handles each conjunct of `VInv`:

| Conjunct | Argument |
|----------|----------|
| `TypeOK` | `{} ∈ SUBSET (Ballot × Value)` (empty set ⊆ anything) and `-1 ∈ Ballot ∪ {-1}`; closed by `BY DEF Init, TypeOK, Ballot` |
| `VInv2` | Assume `VotedFor(a,b,v)`; since `votes[a] = {}` this contradicts the hypothesis, so `SafeAt(b,v)` follows vacuously — `SafeAt` never needs unfolding |
| `VInv3` | Same vacuous contradiction from `votes[a1] = {}` |
| `VInv4` | `DidNotVoteIn(a,b)` holds because `~VotedFor(a,b,v)` for every `v` (since `votes[a] = {}`) |

Each branch reduces the relevant `VotedFor` via the function-application fact `votes[a] = {}` (proved `BY DEF Init`, using the `a ∈ Acceptor` in context), then closes `DEF VotedFor`. The existing theorem statement, declarations, and assumptions were left untouched — only the proof body below the `THEOREM ... ==` line was added.
